question.label: Billing rewrite clarity
question.name: What specifically have you heard about the billing rewrite, and what's unclear to you?
question.description: Clarifies Priya's understanding and expectations about the billing rewrite.

answer: Growth-wise I think I'm flat. I'm the most senior IC on the team and there's no one really pushing me.

assessment.note: Priya's response focused on growth stagnation rather than clarity about the billing rewrite.

new_queue.label: Growth stagnation
new_queue.name: What would actually push your growth here, and what would need to change to make that happen?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.
Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Payments was real — I owned the migration plan and made the call on the dual-write window. I'm proud of how that went.
